---
title: "Field Survey: Tools and Techniques"
subtitle: "Practical methods for primary data collection and physical surveying in Geography."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include field-survey/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Field Survey: Tools and Techniques** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include field-survey/01-principles-of-field-survey.md >}}

{{< include field-survey/02-physical-survey-instruments.md >}}

{{< include field-survey/03-socio-economic-survey.md >}}

---
